summary: ANDROID | Device remains connected in app after Bluetooth disconnect
scenario: Device remains shown as connected in the app after the user disconnects the headset via the Bluetooth menu
description_clean: Device remains shown as connected in the app after the user disconnects the headset via the Bluetooth menu. Expected behavior: device state should update to disconnected.
steps: Open the app and ensure the headset is connected via Bluetooth.
Go to the device's Bluetooth settings menu.
Disconnect the headset from the Bluetooth menu.
Return to the app and observe the device connection status.
expected: Device state should update to disconnected.
actual: Device remains shown as connected in the app.
